study.title: Soil bacterial communities of Switchgrass and other biofuel grasses in the Michigan and Wisconsin (2016)
study.description: Meta-amplicon sequencing of the soil bacterial community of Switchgrass (var. Cave-n-Rock) along with other biofuel grasses with the Great Lakes Bioenergy Research Center Marginal Lands Experiment. Samples were collected in 2016.

attributes.isolation_source: Kit ZymoBIOMICS Microbial Community DNA Standard
